ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "ship_mode" TEXT /* Mode of shipping used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  "order_source" TEXT /* Source of the order (e.g., website, mobile app, physical store) */,
  "delivery_address" TEXT /* Full delivery address for the order */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the date dimension table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES date_dim ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "segment" TEXT /* Segment the customer belongs to (e.g., consumer, corporate) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "postal_code" INTEGER /* Postal code of the customer's location */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the customer is located */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered with the company */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Points accumulated by the customer in a loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* ID of the supplier providing the product */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was manufactured */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the product (if applicable) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., length, width, height) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit made from the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the product at the time of the order */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the product in the order (quantity * unit_price) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id", "product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order the sale belongs to */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product */,
  "sales" REAL /* Total sales of the product */,
  "price_per_unit" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the date dimension table */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin percentage for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id", "product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES date_dim ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_manager" TEXT /* Name of the region manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_manager" TEXT /* Name of the category manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "date_dim" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the date */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the date */,
  "year_month" TEXT /* Year and month of the date in 'YYYY-MM' format */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the month */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "week_of_year" INTEGER /* Week of the year */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year (e.g., Q1, Q2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id")
)
